title: symmeria paniculata
intro: Symmeria paniculata, also known as Parry's phacelia, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of colds and flu. The health benefits of Symmeria paniculata include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Symmeria paniculata can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
